name: tvorogme-lorelog
description: Indexes local Codex sessions and publishes live adventure-guild LoreLog metrics to tvorog.me.

interface.shortDescription: Publish Codex sessions as live guild lore.
interface.longDescription: Matches local Codex prompts and observed patch metrics to tvorog.me projects, then pushes a live LoreLog index to the site server.
defaultPrompt: Explain how Codex sessions match to quests.
Check the live LoreLog server snapshot.
